infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: UHUB needs camera access to take photos for posts, avatars, and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UHUB needs photo library access to select images for posts, avatars, and messages.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: UHUB needs microphone access to record voice messages.

plugins.cameraPermission: UHUB needs camera access to scan QR codes and take photos.

plugins.photosPermission: UHUB needs photo library access to save QR code images.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: UHUB needs permission to save QR code images to your photo library.

plugins.microphonePermission: UHUB needs microphone access for voice-to-text.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: UHUB needs speech recognition access to convert voice to text.
